title: ExclamationChat
description: The plugin adds global and local chat with support for prefixes and colors.
body:
# ExclamationChat

**ExclamationChat** is a chat plugin for Paper/Spigot/Purpur that adds global and local chat channels with prefix support, colors and multi-language messages.  
It is designed for survival / RPG / town servers where separating local and global communication is important.

---

## 🔧 Features

- 🌍 **Global chat** – all players on the server can see messages.
- 🏘 **Local chat** – only players within a configured radius can see the message.
- 🪪 **Prefixes & nicknames**  
  - Prefix support via **Vault / LuckPerms / CMI** if installed.  
  - Works with vanilla nicknames when Vault is not present.
- 🎨 **Custom message formats**  
  - Color support, including HEX (on supported versions).  
  - Tags for chat mode (e.g. `[G]` for global, `[L]` for local).
- 🌐 **Multi-language support**  
  - All plugin messages are stored in separate language files (e.g. Ukrainian, English, French).
- 💬 **Private messages**  
  - Command for direct messages between players.
- 📏 **Local chat check**  
  - If a player uses local chat and no one is nearby, the plugin shows a message that there are no players in range.
- ⚙️ Everything is configurable via config files.

---

## ⌨️ Commands (example)

- `! <message>` – send a message to **global chat**.
- `<message>` – send a message to **local chat**.
- `/msg <player> <message>` – send a **private message**.
- `/r <message>` – reply to the last private message.
- `/exclamationchat reload` – reload plugin configuration.

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- **Server software:** Paper, Spigot, Purpur (1.21.x)
- **Optional:** Vault, LuckPerms, CMI.
